patches.hypothesis: The primary issue is that the bean is being built prematurely. The process should buffer all properties and construct the bean only after all tokens have been processed.
patches.changes: - Construct bean after all tokens have been processed, ensuring all properties are handled correctly

patches.hypothesis: The method prematurely attempts to build the bean before processing all properties, leading to incomplete data in the resulting object.
patches.changes: - Moved the creation of the bean to after all field names have been processed for proper property assignment
